user.title: Connect to senseBox
user.description: Enter a Station ID directly, or leave it empty to find active nearby senseBoxes using Home Assistant's location.

data_description.station_id: The unique 24-character hex ID of your senseBox (e.g. 63b2ab763ee774001b3585b1). Leave empty to search nearby.
data_description.nearby_radius_km: Distance around Home Assistant's configured location used when searching nearby active senseBoxes.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the API (60 – 3600 s, default 300).

nearby.title: Select nearby senseBox
nearby.description: Choose an active nearby senseBox (last measurement within 10 days).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the openSenseMap API. Please check your network connection.
error.location_not_set: Home Assistant location must be configured to search nearby senseBoxes.
error.no_active_nearby: No active nearby senseBoxes were found in the selected radius.
error.station_not_found: No senseBox found with this station ID. Please verify the ID.
